recommendations.title: Run Boy Run
recommendations.overview: A true story of Jurek, an eight-year-old boy, who escapes from the Warsaw ghetto, then manages to survive in the woods and working as a farmhand, disguising himself as a Polish orphan.

recommendations.title: Enforcement

recommendations.title: Divines
recommendations.overview: In a ghetto where religion and drug trafficking rub shoulders, Dounia has a lust for power and success. Supported by Maimouna, her best friend, she decides to follow in the footsteps of Rebecca, a respected dealer. But her encounter with Djigui, a yo

recommendations.title: The Courageous Heart of Irena Sendler
recommendations.overview: Irena Sendler is a Catholic social worker who has sympathized with the Jews since her childhood, when her physician father died of typhus contracted while treating poor Jewish patients. When she initially proposes saving Jewish children from the Wars

recommendations.title: Enemy at the Gates
recommendations.overview: A Russian and a German sniper play a game of cat-and-mouse during the Battle of Stalingrad in WWII.

recommendations.title: Blood & Gold
recommendations.overview: At the end of World War II, a German soldier is looking for his daughter while an SS troop is looking for a Jewish treasure.

recommendations.title: My Way

recommendations.title: Gods
recommendations.overview: Set in communist Poland of the 80s the movie depicts early career of cardio surgeon Zbigniew Religa.
